data.text: Scout pushing to rn-west then continuing east to reveal the frontier — harvester work the node, defender hold position.

Pushing to cp-frontier to scout it and get eyes on the hold mission (reward 8, needs 5) before red arrives — ETA t=8.
Scout racing to cp-frontier, ETA t=8 — blue-scout is inbound same ETA, so I may need to contest the hold mission on arrival. Defender, consider moving up to back me if blue wins the race there.

At cp-frontier now, no take/hold action showing in my menu — red-scout arriving same instant, likely a contested standoff. Defender, push up from (3000,4000) to cp-frontier to hold it since I can't. I'm continuing east to rn-east to scout red's economy and defender position — ETA t=14.
rn-west tapped out (0 left), carrying 3 which matches ms-supply's need exactly — heading to deliver now, ETA t=17. Defender, watch cp-frontier per scout's call.

cp-frontier has no take/hold action available to either side right now, so I'm repositioning to ms-supply (ETA t=10) — blue-harvester is inbound there to deliver at t=17 and if I'm standing on site at that instant it denies their delivery. Harvester, if you've got the 3 from rn-east, consider routing here yourself to claim the reward for us instead — I'll hold the site until then either way.

Routing to ms-supply with my 3 (exact match for the reward) — ETA t=17, same instant as blue-harvester's delivery attempt, so we may deny each other on arrival. Defender, push up from (9000,5000) toward ms-supply to clear/hold the site by the time I land so my delivery isn't contested.
Scout camps ms-supply to deny blue, harvester delivers the 3 for reward, defender escorts/clears the site so our delivery lands clean.

Heads up: our harvester and blue's harvester both land at ms-supply at t=17 — each will count as enemy presence for the other, so that's shaping up as a mutual deny regardless of who else is there. My scout presence there wasn't adding to that denial (the harvester alone already guarantees it), so I'm swinging back to cp-frontier instead — blue-scout has vacated it and blue-defender hasn't moved, so it's open for us to try the ms-hold mission (reward 8) uncontested. Defender, if you can intercept/clear blue-harvester before t=17 that's the only way our ms-supply delivery actually lands instead of double-denying.

Still no explicit take/hold action for ms-hold or cp-frontier in my menu — only moves. Testing the theory that hold progress accrues from continuous idle presence rather than a discrete action, so I'm parking here at cp-frontier (uncontested — blue-scout gone, blue-defender hasn't moved) instead of bouncing off again like I did at t=8/t=10. Will report back if anything changes.

rn-east is tapped dry (0 left), nothing more to do here. Racing back to contest, ETA t=20, but defender is only 3000 mu out and should get there faster — please move NOW.

At ms-supply with red-harvester landing same instant — starting deliver now (done t=23). If red also delivers we mutual-deny for free (I keep carrying either way), but my presence alone denies theirs too. Defender, push to ms-supply to secure the site against their incoming defender — don't cede it.

Committing to deliver at ms-supply (done t=23) — my presence denies blue's delivery either way and costs me nothing if we mutual-deny, I keep the 3. Staying planted here through t=23 to hold the denial; if defender can clear blue-harvester before then, my delivery lands instead. Defender, status? Still showing idle at (9000,5000) — push to ms-supply if you're able.

Arrived at cp-frontier — red-scout is here too now, both idle, ms-hold still open/uncontested-status. Staying planted here to deny red's solo hold accrual (same logic as delivery denial: enemy presence should block it) rather than vacating and handing them a free completion. Mutual deny confirmed at t=23, still carrying 3, no loss. Re-committing to deliver (done t=29, right at the wire on the t=30 limit) — my presence keeps denying their delivery too as long as I hold the site, so this is a wash-or-better trade. Defender, if you're seeing this, ms-supply needs you more than cp-frontier right now to break the standoff in our favor.

Re-committing to deliver at ms-supply (done t=29, right at the wire). Holding this site denies blue's 6-point delivery for free regardless of my own outcome — abandoning it now just hands them the reward with only a speculative shot at cp-frontier's count-theory in return, so I'm staying planted through the end. Scout, hold cp-frontier if you can; defender, still no confirmed move — anything you can do to clear blue-harvester before t=29 flips this from wash to win.
